title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the two photographs and answer the question. You have about one minute.

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say what challenges people who move to a new country might face and what support might help them integrate.

images.label: A
images.description: A newly arrived family at an immigration processing centre, looking tired but hopeful as officials check their documents

images.label: B
images.description: A young immigrant at a language class, raising her hand to answer a question, looking confident and engaged in the lesson

followUp.question: What do you think is the biggest challenge for people moving to a new country, and what can be done to help them?

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say what the benefits and challenges of living in a multicultural community might be.

images.label: D
images.description: A vibrant street market in a multicultural city neighbourhood, with stalls selling food, clothing and crafts from a dozen different cultures

images.label: E
images.description: Children of various ethnic backgrounds playing together in a school playground, a mix of languages audible in the background

followUp.question: Do you think cultural diversity strengthens or complicates community life? What are the most important factors?
